title: Command Result
description: Emitted when an agent completes command execution. Contains outcome classification and optional result data.

command_id.description: ID of the command that produced this result.

action.description: The command action that was executed.

outcome.description: 'success': completed fully. 'partial': completed with caveats. 'skipped': idempotency dedup, no work done.

duration_ms.description: Execution time from ack to result in milliseconds.

result_payload.description: Action-specific result data. Null for skipped outcomes.

fsm_version.description: FSM version after transitioning back to idle.
